What It Is: Number of photos containing this person
Key Use Cases: Sort by frequency, statistics, 'Most photographed' lists
Filter identified vs unknown faces, confidence level
Filter only confirmed identities, training data quality

What It Is: Unique identifier for this person (syncs across devices)
Inferred gender from ML analysis (0=not detected, 1=male, 2=female, etc)
Estimated age group from ML (baby, child, adult, senior)
User's manual ordering of favorite people
Key Use Cases: Display favorites first in People album

What It Is: Whether suggested to user to name
Contact info if matched to phone contacts
Link to ZPERSON.Z_PK (which person is in this face?)
Key Use Cases: Join to get person name from photo

What It Is: Link to ZASSET.Z_PK (which photo contains this face?)
Key Use Cases: Join to get all photos of a person
Higher = clearer face, better for cropping

What It Is: X coordinate of face center (0.0-1.0 normalized)
Y coordinate of face center (0.0-1.0 normalized)
Reference to face crop image record
Link to source person (in case of merges)
